description: All LangChain astream_events(version='v2') event types consumed by LambChat's AgentEventProcessor.
note: These are raw LangChain graph stream events, NOT the SSE events sent to the frontend. Each LangChain event is processed by AgentEventProcessor.process_event() and may emit zero or more SSE events via Presenter.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a chat model invocation begins.
stream_events.note: Not explicitly handled; falls through _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES filter (not in the set).

stream_events.description: Emitted for each token/chunk produced by a chat model during streaming.
stream_events.routing: Routed by metadata lc_source: if 'summarization' -> _handle_summary_stream, else -> _handle_chat_stream.

content_variants.string_text: Direct text string -> buffered and emitted as message:chunk
content_variants.empty_string_with_reasoning: Empty content with additional_kwargs.reasoning_content -> emitted as thinking
content_variants.list_text_block: list with {type: 'text', text: '...'} -> buffered as message:chunk
content_variants.list_thinking_block: list with {type: 'thinking', thinking: '...'} -> emitted as thinking
content_variants.list_reasoning_block: list with {type: 'reasoning', reasoning: '...'} -> emitted as thinking

stream_events.description: Emitted when a chat model invocation completes. Used to flush pending chunks and accumulate token usage.
stream_events.note: Flushes chunk buffers (may emit pending message:chunk / summary events). Token usage is accumulated but not emitted here — emitted once via emit_token_usage() after stream ends.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a tool invocation begins.
stream_events.routing: If tool name == 'task' -> _handle_task_start (subagent dispatch). If tool name == 'write_todos' -> present_todo. Otherwise -> present_tool_start.

special_cases.task: _handle_task_start: extracts subagent_type, description from input. Tracks checkpoint_to_agent mapping. Emits agent:call with depth calculated from checkpoint_ns.
special_cases.write_todos: Extracts todos list from input and emits todo:updated. Does NOT emit tool:start.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a tool invocation completes successfully.
stream_events.routing: If tool name == 'task' -> _handle_task_end (subagent result). If tool name == 'write_todos' -> skip. Otherwise -> present_tool_result.
stream_events.output_processing: Raw output is extracted via extract_tool_output(), checked for errors via detect_tool_error(). JSON strings are parsed. Dicts with 'blocks' key trigger binary upload. MCP blocks are handled.

special_cases.task: _handle_task_end: resolves agent info from checkpoint_to_agent, extracts result from output.update.messages[0].content. Emits agent:result.
special_cases.write_todos: Silently skipped — no SSE event emitted.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a tool invocation fails with an error.
stream_events.routing: If tool name == 'task' -> _handle_task_error. Otherwise -> _handle_tool_error (may emit tool:start if not previously emitted, then tool:result with success=false).

special_cases.task: _handle_task_error: resolves agent info, emits agent:result with success=false.
special_cases.generic: If tool_call_id not in _started_tool_call_ids, emits tool:start first. Then emits tool:result with success=false.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a chain (or LangGraph node) starts executing.
stream_events.note: Only handled when name == 'rubric_grader'; emits agent:call and sets suppression flag. All other on_chain_start events fall through to the _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES filter and are silently ignored.

stream_events.description: Emitted for intermediate chain streaming outputs.
stream_events.note: Not in _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES; silently ignored by processor.

stream_events.description: Emitted when a chain (or LangGraph node) finishes executing.
stream_events.note: Only handled when name == 'rubric_grader'; emits agent:result with structured_response content and clears suppression flag. All other on_chain_end events are silently ignored.
Not in _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES; silently ignored by processor.
Not in _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES; silently ignored by processor.

stream_events.description: Emitted when an output parser starts.
stream_events.note: Not in _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES; silently ignored by processor.

stream_events.description: Emitted when an output parser finishes.
stream_events.note: Not in _CONTEXT_EVENT_TYPES; silently ignored by processor.

event_flow_summary.description: How LangChain events flow through the system to produce SSE events for the frontend.
pipeline: 1. LangGraph graph.astream_events(state, config, version='v2') emits raw LangChain events
2. Events are placed into asyncio.Queue (base.py) or directly iterated (agent nodes)
3. AgentEventProcessor.process_event(event) dispatches based on event['event'] and event['name']
4. Processor calls Presenter.present_*() methods to build SSE event dicts
5. SSE events are yielded via presenter.emit() -> saved to Redis/MongoDB -> sent to frontend
consumed_by_agents: BaseGraphAgent._stream() — uses asyncio.Queue with interrupt checking
FastAgent nodes.py — direct iteration via inner_graph.astream_events()
SearchAgent nodes.py — direct iteration via inner_graph.astream_events()
TeamAgent nodes.py — direct iteration via inner_graph.astream_events()
